entries.title: A Shared Passion for Exploration: Kotaro Meguro & the UX
entries.description: The quest for constant exploration with Chef Kotaro Meguro and Lexus.

entries.title: Visionaries: Artistic License
entries.description: In San Francisco, painter Vincent Serritella is breaking from convention, bridging the gap between artist and collector, traditional painting, and advanced animation technology. We meet the artist resolutely following his own path.

entries.title: Beauty in the Build: Paul Tange and the Lexus LC
entries.description: Journey through the sleeping streets of Tokyo in the Lexus LC as world renowned, Japanese architect Paul Tange reveals the hidden beauty within architecture.

entries.title: Envisioning the Future of Design at Design Miami/
entries.description: This year Lexus became the official automotive partner of Design Miami/.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: All-New 2022 Lexus NX Appears in Epic New Sci-Fi Film From Director Roland Emmerich.

entries.title: Visionaries: On-demand Shooting Stars
entries.description: Exploring new possibilities in space, astrophysicist Lena Okajima is turning our night sky into a canvas with her spectra of artificial shooting stars.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: Lexus reimagines the Luxury Airport Lounge experience with design, innovation and hospitality at its core.

entries.title: The Next Generation of Lexus
entries.description: To mark the beginning of its next generation, Lexus will unveil a new brand vision, which will take form in a new Electrified concept.

entries.title: Lexus to Premiere All-new NX
entries.description: Where luxury and lifestyle meet, on the road and beyond.

entries.title: The Harmony of Man and Machine / Discover Lexus
entries.description: Unrivaled craft only comes from robots and humans working in harmony.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: There is only one route to superior craft, and it takes extraordinary attention to detail. A Lexus Takumi Master Craftsman takes 60,000 hours of practice and training to achieve this.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: After 60,000 hours of practice and training Lexus Takumi Master Craftsmen develop almost superhuman senses.

entries.title: Never Stop Evolving: Gohgan & the LC
entries.description: Born from a concept car, the Lexus LC was originally announced as a design model and not planned to be marketed. It was said to be impossible to commercialize.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: On October 14th at 1:30 am JST, Lexus will unveil the All-New LX online. Watch the reveal show and discover all the details of the All-New LX here.

entries.title: Lexus Presents Freedom To Move
entries.description: Lexus previewed Freedom To Move, a conceptual design project made in collaboration with Tosin Oshinowo and Chrissa Amuah at Design Miami/ 2020.

entries.title: Culinary Travel: Chef Lionel Beccat & LC Convertible
entries.description: Where luxury and lifestyle meet, on the road and beyond.

entries.title: Lexus Golfer Hideki Matsuyama Claims Masters Victory
entries.description: Hideki Matsuyama, sponsored by Lexus, claimed a final-round victory in the 2021 Masters Tournament held on April 8â11 at the challenging Augusta National Golf Club in the United States.

entries.title: LF-Z Electrified Virtual Interiors â¨Series
entries.description: Three pioneering artists and designers re-imagine the interior of the new LF-Z Electrified Concept Car.

entries.title: Shaping Sound: Mark Levinson Audio Engineer, Savion Thomson
entries.description: Take an inspiring drive in the Lexus RX and discover the power of true audio fidelity as Mark Levinson audio engineer, Savion Thompson, relates soundâs ability to unlock something you didnât know was inside of you.

entries.title: The Lexus Cookbook: Culinary Perspectives
entries.description: Lexus launches its global digital cookbook, Culinary Perspectives, as part of its new Lexus Creates initiative.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: Takumi is the name given to Japanese master craftsmen that devote a lifetime to their craft. Explore the unique philosophy of Takumi in today's modern world.

entries.title: Greatest Circuit Series: Paul Ricard
entries.description: With its eye catching red and blue lines, the high tech Paul Ricard circuit is now the test course of the worldâs best performing cars.

entries.title: Journeys Beyond the Road
entries.description: Lexus SLIDE and The Lexus Sport Yacht are two innovations from Lexus that bring to life how we might travel in the future.

entries.title: Visionaries: Engineering Eco-Friendly Surfboards
entries.description: Rodolfo GonzaÌlez and his Biofoam technology are making waves in Costa Rica by shaping a new future for cleaner surfboards.

entries.title: Greatest Circuit Series: NÃ¼rburgring
entries.description: A single lap around the NuÌrburgring Nordschleife race track is said to be equivalent to 2,000 km traveled on normal roads. A perfect place to further refine the performance and design of the Lexus LC.

entries.title: Lexus Electrified: A Bold New Direction
entries.description: Lexus reveals a roadmap to the future with a bold new direction.

entries.title: CIRCUIT TO ROAD AND BEYOND
entries.description: Merging the thrill of the race with the precision of innovation, Lexus harnesses the essence of motorsports to craft the luxury driving experiences of tomorrow.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: Road-going cars are built primarily for safety and comfort, but theyâre not a million miles apart from their race-car cousins built for the track.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: This content is consisted of two pillars of what LEXUS aspires to achieve through its yearslong participation in motorsport. One is about utilizing the racecourse as a cutting-edge lab where the engineers constantly push the boundaries of their carâs basic capabilitiesârunning, stopping, and turning. The other is about LEXUSâs commitment to providing opportunities for customers to drive its racecar or high-performance model on real circuitsâthe ultimate circuit driving experience.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: Motorsports is a global laboratory for the study of aerodynamics. Just as mesmerizing geological formations have been carved by winds over the millennia, so too has the elegant, streamlined form of the motor car been shaped by the wind on the track.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: After spearheading aerodynamics research in automotive development, Italy remains a world leader in the fieldâbut it is also a global design powerhouse in such diverse arenas as architecture, interior design, fashion, and jewellery.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: From the world-famous highways sweeping across vast panoramas of wilderness in the southern foothills of the Italian Alps; past Turin and Milan, the industrial and artisanal heartlands of Italyâs north; around Modena, with its indelible links to motoring history; and on to Imola, the veritable mecca of motorsport.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: Since its founding 35 years ago, Lexus has continually challenged the status quo within the luxury automotive space. LEXUS DESIGN AWARD was born out of this challenger spirit, along with the firm belief that design can change the world.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: As an early adopter of using bamboo in the car-making process, Lexus proves that its vision of a sustainable mobility society is already driving the future forward.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: As part of Milan Design Week 2024, Lexus debuted a future-forward take on time, design, and the next generation of mobility.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: Experience the fusion of art and sustainability in Lexusâ latest unveiling at ICA Miami, â8 Minutes and 20 Secondsâ, a solar sculpture by Marjan van Aubel inspired by the Lexus Future Zero-emission Catalyst concept car.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: Lexus has partnered with research and design studio, Crafting Plastics, to present Liminal Spaces at the Institute of Contemporary Art, Miami (ICA Miami). Inspired by the Lexus LF-ZC (Lexus Future Zero-emission Catalyst) Battery Electric Vehicle (BEV) concept, Liminal Spaces explores the symbiosis between humans, vanguard materials, nature, and software defined vehicles (SDV) through thought-provoking, interactive artworks aimed at stimulating an experiencerâs senses. Liminal Spaces is on d...

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: The invigorating sight of a Lexus zooming through town has the power to instantly fill the mindâfor just a momentâwith images of the passionate, vibrant world of motor racing. The same happens when gripping a Lexusâs steering wheel. The carâs rhythmic vibrations and the pleasing crescendo of its powertrain can conjure images of high-speed racing circuits, adding excitement to the drive.

entries.title: Discover the Global World of Lexus
entries.description: Embracing the spirit of motorsports, Lexus drives forward to the intersection of competition and innovation, paving the way for the future of luxury.

entries.title: Lexus Overtrail Project
entries.description: With a vision centered on sustainability and harmony with nature, Lexus brings to life the Overtrail Project.

entries.title: Discover Together and the Next Wave of Design Innovation
entries.description: Lexus returns to Milan Design Week to unveil A-Un, an immersive installation exploring the future of next-generation human-machine mobility.

entries.title: LEXUS EARNS FIRST-EVER WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP POLE POSITION
entries.description: A Lexus RC F LMGT3 race car starts an FIA World Endurance Championship (WEC) race from the front for the first time Young driver Finn Gehrsitz set the fastest time in the #78 RC F LMGT3 entered by the AKKODIS ASP team Lexus is pushing boundaries and challenging the established order in only its second season of WEC competition Lexus reached a milestone in its motorsports activities when the RC F LMGT3 race car conquered the legendary Spa-Francorchamps circuit in Belgium and achieved its first...

entries.title: ALL-NEW LEXUS ES TAKES SEDAN STYLING, LUXURY AND REFINEMENT TO A HIGHER LEVEL
entries.description: European premiere of the all-new, eighth generation Lexus ES New model builds on the foundation of the current ES to deliver a clear step-up in performance, refinement, comfort and luxury appointments Clean x Tech exterior and interior design theme delivers sleek, simple and elegant aesthetic Brand-new LexusConnect multimedia system with faster response and enhanced functions Multi-pathway powertrain strategy delivers a choice of full hybrid powertrains and the first battery electric ES model...

entries.title: THE NEW LEXUS RZ: MORE POWER, EFFICIENCY AND DRIVING REWARDS
entries.description: New RZ evolves driving pleasure and day-to-day ease of use with fundamental improvements in performance, enhanced power and efficiency, and the introduction of new electrification technologies Dynamic performance honed to reinforce the Lexus Driving Signature with higher body rigidity, suspension tuning and evolution of the DIRECT4 all-wheel drive system Unique driving experience with the debut of Lexus’ steer-by-wire system Comprehensive revision of the BEV powertrain, including new high-cap...

entries.title: Lexus oficjalnym partnerem motoryzacyjnym finałów rozgrywek Pucharu Davisa — Davis Cup by Rakuten Finals 2021
entries.description: Lexus będzie oficjalnym sponsorem motoryzacyjnym finałów prestiżowych, międzynarodowych rozgrywek Pucharu Davisa — Davis Cup by Rakuten Finals 2021, które odbywać się będą od 25 listopada do 5 grudnia w Madrycie.

entries.title: Lexus został Partnerem Międzynarodowego Konkursu Pianistycznego im. Fryderyka Chopina
entries.description: To kolejny przykład zaangażowania naszej marki w ambitne projekty związane z kulturą i wspieraniem artystów na całym świecie.

entries.title: Polski pianista otrzymał najnowszy model ES
entries.description: W tegorocznym Konkursie Chopinowskim polski pianista zajął IV miejsce i został najlepszym wykonawcą mazurków Chopina.

entries.title: 2021 Międzynarodowy Festiwal Filmowy w Wenecji
entries.description: Lexus zostaje Oficjalnym Samochodem Międzynarodowego Festiwalu Filmowego w Wenecji — La Biennale di Venezia 2021

entries.title: Chopin i jego Europa
entries.description: Tegoroczna edycja festiwalu „Chopin i jego Europa” jest dla Lexusa szczególna. Marka, we współpracy z Narodowym Instytutem Fryderyka Chopina zrealizowała projekt, którego gwiazdą został Bruce Liu, zwycięzca XVIII Międzynarodowego Konkursu Chopinowskiego.

entries.title: Lexus oficjalnym partnerem motoryzacyjnym finałów rozgrywek Pucharu Davisa — Davis Cup by Rakuten Finals 2022
entries.description: Turniej rozpocznie się od meczów fazy grupowej, rozgrywanych w Bolonii, Glasgow, Hamburgu i Walencji od 13 do 18 września. Następnie, od 22 do 27 listopada, w hiszpańskiej Maladze odbywać się będą mecze pucharowe.

entries.title: RX na Festiwalu Filmowym w Wenecji
entries.description: Lexus został ogłoszony Oficjalnym Samochodem 79. Międzynarodowego Festiwalu Filmowego w Wenecji – La Biennale di Venezia i powraca jako sponsor już szósty rok z rzędu.

entries.title: Inauguracja 79. Międzynarodowego Festiwalu Filmowego w Wenecji
entries.description: Lexus towarzyszy gwiazdom kina na inauguracji 79. Międzynarodowego Festiwalu Filmowego w Wenecji.

entries.title: Lexus globalnym partnerem ATP
entries.description: Lexus zawarł wieloletnią umowę z ATP i został Partnerem Platynowym oraz Oficjalnym Partnerem Motoryzacyjnym najważniejszego męskiego cyklu tenisowego ATP Tour.

entries.title: LBX Milan Pop-up Events
entries.description: Z okazji premiery nowego modelu LBX Lexus organizuje w Europie cykl czterech krótkich wydarzeń, które wniosą wyjątkowe wrażenia do codzienności uczestników.

entries.title: Wyjątkowa myjnia samochodowa inspirowana modelem LBX
entries.description: Od uspokajającego zanurzenia po labirynt szczotek naturalnej wielkości — zobacz, jak w Mediolanie zbudowaliśmy niezwykłość z czegoś codziennego.

entries.title: Wyjątkowy parking z okazji premiery LBX
entries.description: Zobacz, jak nasze londyńskie wydarzenie zmieniło zwykły parking wielopoziomowy w fascynującą przestrzeń sztuki i uchwyciło wyjątkowe piękno Lexusa LBX.

entries.title: Wydarzenie w Paryżu inspirowane przez LBX
entries.description: W dniach 23 i 24 listopada 2023 r. odbyło się nasze czwarte i ostatnie miejskie wydarzenie inspirowane przez LBX — L’Extraordinaire Boulangerie.

entries.title: Wizja przyszłości na wystawie Japan Mobility Show
entries.description: Lexus zorganizował światową premierę koncepcyjnych elektrycznych pojazdów akumulatorowych na pierwszej wystawie Japan Mobility Show (Tokio, od 26 października do 5 listopada).

entries.title: Lexus Design Award 2023: ogłoszono zwycięzców
entries.description: Lexus poinformował dziś, które cztery prace zwyciężyły w konkursie wzornictwa Lexus Design Award 2023 kierowanym do obiecujących twórców z całego świata.

entries.title: Lexus Design Award 2023
entries.description: Lexus rozpoczyna nabór zgłoszeń do konkursu LEXUS DESIGN AWARD 2023.

entries.title: Lexus Design Award 2023: jury i mentorzy
entries.description: Lexus ogłosił nazwiska czworga jurorów światowego konkursu LEXUS DESIGN AWARD 2023, który wspiera nowe pokolenie twórców i pomaga rozwijać ich talent.

entries.title: Lexus Design Award 2023: Jury i mentorzy 2
entries.description: Lexus ma zaszczyt ogłosić, że Karim Rashid dołącza do jury, a Marjan van Aubel, Yuri Suzuki i Sumayya Vally — do grona mentorów w konkursie LEXUS DESIGN AWARD 2023.

entries.title: 80. Międzynarodowy Festiwal Filmowy W Wenecji
entries.description: Nowy LBX został oficjalnym samochodem 80. Międzynarodowego Festiwalu Filmowego w Wenecji potwierdzając wyjątkową więź Lexusa ze światem kina.

entries.title: Pierwsze prestiżowe nagrody w Europie dla LBX
entries.description: Miło nam poinformować, że Lexus LBX został wybrany samochodem roku i najlepszym małym SUV-em w konkursie magazynu „What Car?”. Zapraszamy do lektury artykułu.

entries.title: Lexus LBX i nadzwyczajni twórcy
entries.description: Z okazji premiery modelu LBX Lexus nawiązuje współpracę z artystami, którzy zmieniają miejską codzienność w nadzwyczajne dzieła sztuki cyfrowej. Dowiedz się więcej o twórcach i nowym LBX.

entries.title: LEXUS PO RAZ ÓSMY PARTNEREM FESTIWALU FILMOWEGO W WENECJI
entries.description: W tym roku po raz ósmy Lexus jest oficjalnym samochodem Międzynarodowego Festiwalu Filmowego w Wenecji. Tym samym potwierdza on swoją silną więź ze światem kina.

entries.title: Shimoyama, czyli nowy dom Lexusa
entries.description: Shimoyama to nowa, ultranowoczesna i wyspecjalizowana międzynarodowa siedziba zespołów, które zajmują się tworzeniem samochodów Lexus w Japonii.

entries.title: Nowy Lexus RX zdobywa pięć gwiazdek w testach bezpieczeństwa
entries.description: Nowy Lexus RX podczas każdej jazdy dba o bezpieczeństwo Twoje i Twoich pasażerów. Ruch wokół pojazdu i sytuacja przed nim są stale monitorowane.

entries.title: Międzynarodowy Festiwal Filmowy w Wenecji
entries.description: Już czwarty rok z rzędu Lexus jest oficjalnym samochodem Biennale Cinema 2020, które odbędzie się na wyspie Lido w Wenecji od 2 do 12 września 2020 roku.

entries.title: Online Service Booking
entries.description: Nie masz czasu na umawianie wizyty w serwisie przez telefon albo osobiście? Już teraz możesz to zrobić w dowolnej chwili i z dowolnego miejsca przez Internet! Dowiedz się więcej o nowej funkcjonalności Lexus Online Service Booking na www.lexus-polska.pl/osb.

entries.title: Światowa premiera nowego ES
entries.description: 23 kwietnia na targach Auto Shanghai zaplanowana jest światowa premiera nowego Lexusa ES

entries.title: Lexus NX z wyróżnieniem Top Safety Pick 2025
entries.description: Na liście samochodów z najlepszymi wynikami znalazł się Lexus NX, który otrzymał tytuł Top Safety Pick 2025.

entries.title: Milan Design Week 2025
entries.description: Innowacyjna technologia „Black Butterfly” Lexusa inspiracją dla wielozmysłowych instalacji na Milan Design Week 2025.

entries.title: Lexus w czołówce mistrzostw świata
entries.description: Historyczne podium I Pole Position

entries.title: Z Japonii do Polski
entries.description: W tych fabrykach produkowane są Lexusy dla polskich klientów.

entries.title: Półrocze wzrostów Lexusa
entries.description: Od stycznia do czerwca 2025 roku zarejestrowano w Polsce 8122 Lexusy. To wzrost o 14,9% w porównaniu z pierwszym półroczem 2024 roku.

entries.title: Dwa tenisowe rekordy Guinnessa ustanowione na dachach Lexusów NX
entries.description: Lexus NX przyczynił się do ustanowienia dwóch wpisów do Księgi Rekordów Guinnessa. Brytyjscy tenisiści Jamie Murray i Laura Robson rozegrali najdłuższą wymianę na dachach poruszających się NX-ów.

entries.title: FIRST-EVER WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP RACE WIN FOR LEXUS
entries.description: A Lexus RC F LMGT3 race car wins an FIA World Endurance Championship (WEC) race for the first time The #87 RC F LMGT3 entered by the AKKODIS ASP team wins round five of the 2025 season, the 6 Hours of São Paulo Lexus is pushing boundaries and challenging the established order in only its second season of WEC competition Lexus achieved a breakthrough victory when an RC F LMGT3 race car overcame its rivals to win for the first time in the FIA World Endurance Championship (WEC), at the 6 Hours o...

entries.title: Pierwsze zwycięstwo Lexusa w mistrzostwach świata
entries.description: Lexus RC F GT3 odniósł pierwsze zwycięstwo w mistrzostwach świata w wyścigach długodystansowych

entries.title: LEXUS SUPPORTS EXCELLENCE AND INNOVATION AS SPONSOR AND OFFICIAL CAR OF THE 82ND VENICE INTERNATIONAL FILM FESTIVAL
entries.description: International luxury brand supports the Venice International Film Festival – La Biennale di Venezia – for a ninth consecutive year Lexus enjoys creative synergies with the world of film, through passion, innovation and creativity The breadth of Lexus’ electrification technologies to be represented in the vehicle fleet chauffeuring directors, actors and VIP guests to festival events Spotlight will fall on the all-new, all-electric Lexus ES sedan, which will be given its own red carpet preview...

entries.title: Oficjalny samochód 82. Festiwalu w Wenecji
entries.description: Lexus jako sponsor 82. Międzynarodowego Festiwalu Filmowego w Wenecji prezentuje samochody premium łączące zrównoważony rozwój z innowacyjnością świata sztuki.

entries.title: LEXUS SPORT CONCEPT DEBUTS AT 2025 EDITION OF THE QUAIL, A MOTORSPORTS GATHERING
entries.description: This morning, Lexus debuted the Lexus Sport Concept before the crowd enjoying The Quail, A Motorsport Gathering at The Quail Lodge and Golf Club in Carmel, California. The progressively styled, future-focused yet truly authentic sportscar signals the way forward for LEXUS design. This inspiring concept car features a wide, low-profile two-door form that blends dynamic and emotional elements into a vision for a next-generation sports car.

entries.title: Milan Design Week: A-Un Exhibit
entries.description: Lexus returns to Milan Design Week to unveil A-Un, an immersive installation exploring the future of next-generation human-machine mobility.

entries.title: The Evolution of CMF Design
entries.description: Lexus designers break boundaries to elevate the luxury experience by crafting emotional sensorial experiences with the thoughtful use of color, material and finish

entries.title: TCE największym rynkiem Lexusa w Europie. Wiodąca rola Polski

entries.title: Innowacyjny układ kierowniczy steer-by-wire
entries.description: Elektryczny SUV Lexus RZ wzniósł naszą markę na najwyższy poziom zaawansowania technologicznego. Przykładem może być pod tym względem układ kierowniczy steer-by-wire – rozwiązanie znane z lotnictwa, które zapewnia jeszcze większą precyzję i intuicyjność prowadzenia.

entries.title: LEXUS LBX OFFERS MORE CHOICE AND STYLE WITH NEW VIBRANT EDITION
entries.description: New special version of Lexus’ top-selling compact crossover Focus on sporty, dynamic style that enhance the model’s “one segment up” qualities Black-themed exterior design details, including matt-finish 18-inch alloy wheels Bi-tone and monotone paint finish options Luxurious semi-aniline leather upholstery in Black and contrasting Dark Rose High equipment specification including power-adjustable driver’s seat, 64-colour ambient cabin lighting, wireless charger, nanoe-X air quality technology,...

entries.title: Lexus Sport Concept zadebiutował podczas The Quail

entries.title: Limitowana wersja VIBRANT EDITION debiutuje w gamie Lexusa LBX
entries.description: Lexus LBX otrzyma nową limitowaną wersję Vibrant Edition o dynamicznym charakterze. LBX Vibrant Edition produkowany będzie wyłącznie od września 2025 roku do maja 2026 roku.

entries.title: Lexus celebrates Golden Lion winner Jim Jarmusch at the conclusion of the 82nd Venice International Film Festival
entries.description: Completion of another successful festival with Lexus as Sponsor and Official Car Stars of the movie world accompanied to red carpet events by Lexus’ fleet of electrified luxury models Showcase for a preview of the all-new Lexus ES sedan Presentation of the Lexus Visionary Award at Venice Film Week’s Reply AI Film Festival The 82 nd Venice International Film Festival – La Biennale di Venezia – has reached its conclusion with the competition jury awarding the prestigious Golden Lion to Jim Jarm...

entries.description: Lexus po raz dziewiąty był oficjalnym partnerem 82. Międzynarodowego Festiwalu Filmowego w Wenecji – La Biennale di Venezia.

entries.title: 2025 KIWAMI AWARDS HONOUR LEXUS’ FINEST EUROPEAN RETAILERS
entries.description: Lexus is delighted to celebrate the winners of the 2025 Lexus Kiwami Awards, recognising the top-performing centres across its European region. Since their introduction in 2016, the Kiwami (“outstanding excellence”) Awards have highlighted the dedication and innovation of our retailers. With more than 340 official Lexus centres eligible this year, the level of competition and achievement has been truly inspiring. This year, 19 retailers have been recognised for their exceptional business perf...

entries.title: 100 TYSIĘCY HYBRYD PLUG-IN LEXUSA NA DROGACH CAŁEGO ŚWIATA
entries.description: Od 2021 roku klienci Lexusa kupili już 105 784 samochodów z napędem plug-in hybrid.

entries.description: Lexus luxury that engages all the human senses Making luxury personal for every customer Colours, materials and finishes key to the sensory experience Givaudan, bringing fragrance to the journey Audio excellence with Mark Levinson The Lexus approach to luxury is not defined by a single element. It’s about the complete experience when you’re inside your car. As driver or passenger in a Lexus, everything you see, hear, touch and even smell combines in harmony to create a perfect multisensory en...

entries.title: “THE LOFT” BY BRUSSELS AIRLINES AND LEXUS COMPLETES SEVEN AWARD-WINNING YEARS AS EUROPE’S LEADING AIRLINE LOUNGE
entries.description: “THE LOFT” at Brussels Airport has continued its exceptional success story, being named Europe’s Leading Airline Lounge in the World Travel Awards for a seventh consecutive year. The collaboration between Brussels Airlines and Lexus has now received the honour every year since its opening in 2018. It is further reward for a groundbreaking initiative which has seen thousands of passengers enjoy Lexus’ unique Omotenashi hospitality in stylish and luxurious surroundings. The lounge concept compl...

entries.title: Toyota Group at the Japan Mobility Show 2025
entries.description: On Tuesday 29 October, the Toyota Group unveiled a number of new concepts, models, and brand directions at the 2025 Japan Mobility Show. New product offerings were on display showcasing the future strategies and innovations for the automaker’s various marques and nameplates. With highlights featuring Lexus’ “Discover” ecosystem and messaging, the expansion of the Century nameplate into a standalone brand, and various other vehicle mobility products and vehicles from the likes of Toyota and Da...

entries.title: LEXUS ANNOUNCES MULTI-YEAR PARTNERSHIP WITH THE ATP
entries.description: Lexus today announces that it will continue its successful association with the ATP in a further three-year partnership with the top tier of men’s international professional tennis. From 2026 to 2028 the luxury brand will again be the Official Automotive Partner and Platinum Partner of the ATP Tour, building on the relationship it first forged in 2023. Driven by a spirit of innovation and a passion for creating memorable experiences, Lexus brings its unique vision to the world of tennis — whe...

entries.title: LEXUS ENDS THE WEC SEASON WITH VICTORY
entries.description: A Lexus RC F LMGT3 race car wins the 8 Hours of Bahrain, the final round of the 2025 FIA World Endurance Championship (WEC) season The #87 RC F LMGT3 entered by the AKKODIS ASP team wins and secures third place in the 2025 FIA Endurance Trophy for LMGT3 Teams With two wins from eight races, Lexus has challenged the established order in just its second World Championship season Lexus brought the 2025 FIA World Endurance Championship (WEC) season to a successful finish with victory in the hotly...

entries.title: Przedłużenie współpracy między ATP a Lexusem
entries.description: Lexus przedłuża o trzy lata współpracę z ATP, organizacją zarządzającą najważniejszym cyklem turniejowym w męskim tenisie zawodowym.

entries.title: Save the Date: Livestream of All-new Sports Models World Premiere on December 5
entries.description: Toyota Motor Corporation will present the All-new Sports Models World Premiere from 11:00am Japan Standard Time (03:00 a.m. CET) on December 5. The event will be live-streamed (with English interpretation) on this webpage : https://global.toyota/en/newsroom/corporate/43567793.html Following the premiere, a video of the presentation will be archived and the full text of the presentation and official photos will also be posted on this page. entries.title: Lexus LFA Concept
entries.description: Lexus presents the world premiere of the Lexus LFA Concept BEV sports car World premiere of the Lexus LFA Concept A BEV sports car concept designed to embody Lexus’ “Discover Immersion” and exceed customers’ expectations Concept shares core technologies and aspirations with the GR GT and GR GT3 while exploring the potential of BEV sports cars Lexus today presented the world premiere of the Lexus LFA Concept, a study for a battery electric vehicle (BEV) sports car. Born from the strong convict...

entries.title: XIX Międzynarodowy Konkurs Pianistyczny im. Fryderyka Chopina
entries.description: Lexus po raz kolejny jest partnerem Międzynarodowego Konkursu Pianistycznego im. Fryderyka Chopina. W XIX edycji wydarzenia koncerty będą się odbywać od 2 do 23 października w Filharmonii Narodowej w Warszawie.

entries.title: Światowa premiera Lexusa LFA Concept
entries.description: Lexus zaprezentował światu model LFA Concept — prototyp elektrycznego samochodu sportowego, pojazdu całkowicie napędzanego energią elektryczną (BEV).

entries.title: Wybierz atmosferę LBX, która najbardziej Ci odpowiada
entries.description: Która z atmosfer LBX najlepiej pasuje do Ciebie i Twojego stylu użycia? Odkryj charakter naszych wyrafinowanych i dynamicznych atmosfer, aby wybrać tę, która najbardziej Ci odpowiada.

entries.title: „Discover”: nowy kierunek dla marki Lexus
entries.description: Pod hasłem „Discover” — odkrywaj — Lexus obiera nowy kierunek wyznaczony przez ideę wolności i innowacyjności. Pierwszą realizacją tej wizji jest futurystyczny sześciokołowy LS Concept.

entries.title: LEXUS STEER-BY-WIRE: DRIVING REINVENTED
entries.description: Lexus-first steer-by-wire system debuts in the new RZ electric SUV Performance reinforces the Lexus Driving Signature – driver confidence, control and comfort at all times Innovation with multiple rewards – precision, responsiveness and constant sense of connection between the driver and the road A core technology in the delivery of next-level autonomous driving Steering inputs transmitted as electronic signals to the front wheels, with prompt and direct response, strengthening the dialogue b...

entries.title: THE ALL-NEW ES: CREATING ELEGANT SEDAN DESIGN FOR A NEW ERA
entries.description: Lexus’ all-new premium model interprets classic sedan styling for the electrified era New model adopts signature Lexus features, including a spindle body Sleek, streamlined silhouette with tapering cabin and sweeping rear end “Clean Tech and Elegance” interior design principles produce an open, roomy and sleek cabin space All-new Lexus ES to be introduced in Europe later in 2026 Across seven generations, right from the launch of the Lexus brand more than 35 years ago, the ES has distinguished...

entries.title: Lexus to present world premiere of “SPACE” immersive installation at Milan Design Week
entries.description: “SPACE”, a new immersive installation inspired by the new Lexus LS Concept, expressing the brand’s vision of “space” in the context of a luxury lifestyle Milan Design Week presentation also to feature four new works from Discover Together 2026, a collaboration between emerging creators and in-house Lexus designers This year’s theme, “Discover Your Space”, explores personal, private space in an unprecedented way, through immersive works that share the Lexus LS Concept as a motif On public view...

entries.title: Lexus launches “Details”, a new pan-European brand campaign showcasing the rewards of an exceptional focus on detail
entries.description: Lexus attention to detail produces unique, brand-defining quality and is key to delivering amazing experiences to customers The campaign includes films for cinema, television and online channels, featuring the new Lexus RZ electric luxury SUV Where Lexus is concerned, details make the difference and are key to its philosophy of “making luxury personal”. This is the message conveyed in a new pan-European brand campaign that illustrates how Lexus’ attention to detail and application of master c...

entries.title: Lexus na finałach ATP 2024
entries.description: Lexus jako oficjalny partner motoryzacyjny finałów ATP 2024 w Turynie we Włoszech, prezentuje zelektryfikowane modele swoich samochodów.

entries.title: LEXUS BUILDS ENGAGEMENT AND EXCITEMENT WITH INTERACTIVE MANUAL DRIVE
entries.description: Lexus-first Interactive Manual Drive creates a manual gear-shifting experience in a battery electric vehicle Heightened enjoyment and driver engagement with a unique muti-sensory experience First application in the new RZ F SPORT all-electric SUV Virtual eight-speed transmission generates rapid gear shifts based on the driver’s use of the accelerator and the vehicle speed Drivers can feel every moment of the journey with the option to make manual shifts using paddle controls, accompanied by r...

entries.title: Lexus to present world premiere of five installations exploring new definitions of space at Milan Design Week
entries.description: Immersive installations explore new values in luxury and mobility, focusing on how we experience and interact with the space around us Lexus envisions space as a defining quality for the luxury cars of the future and mobility that seamlessly connects land, sea and air “SPACE,” a 360-degree experience that draws inspiration from the new Lexus flagship LS Concept “Discover Your Space,” four works from international co-creators and Lexus craftspeople, under the banner “Discover Together 2026” Le...

entries.title: Five Things to Know About the Lexus Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle Lineup
entries.description: Lexus is building upon its legacy with its next chapter of electrified mobility. An element of this vision includes offering a diverse mix of powertrain options to help meet the needs of Lexus guests. entries.title: Pinehurst Resort Names Lexus Preferred Vehicle Partner
entries.description: Pinehurst Resort and Lexus announced a new partnership today, naming the luxury automaker as the Preferred Vehicle of Pinehurst Resort. The collaboration aligns two iconic brands rooted in craftsmanship, heritage and innovation, while also marking Pinehurst’s first shared brand partnership […] The post Pinehurst Resort Names Lexus Preferred Vehicle Partner appeared first on Lexus USA Newsroom .

entries.title: Inside Laufey’s Blue In Green
entries.description: In a quiet studio in London, award-winning artist Laufey is tracing a feeling most people struggle to articulate. It begins, as many of her stories do, with a melody. One woven into her musical DNA from an early age: Blue […] The post Inside Laufey’s Blue In Green appeared first on Lexus USA Newsroom .

entries.title: 2026 LEXUS ES 350h Hybrid Joins Battery-Electric ES 350e, ES 500e in Eighth-Generation ES Lineup
entries.description: PLANO, Texas (May 1, 2026) - The eighth-generation Lexus ES is now on sale, with the long-running luxury sedan’s latest hybrid model joining the first-ever battery-electric (BEV) ES models in dealerships. Every 2026 Lexus ES shares new styling inside and out; a multi-pathway platform capable of supporting internal combustion and all-electric powertrains; and the latest Lexus Interface touchscreen and digital Multi-Information Display (MID) ahead of the driver. Now utilizing Lexus’ sixth-gener...

entries.title: Top 10 Finishes for Lexus RC F GT3s at Laguna Seca
entries.description: SALINAS, Calif. (May 4, 2026) – Aaron Telitz and Benjamin Pedersen led the way for Vasser Sullivan with a sixth-place result for the No. 12 Lexus RC F GT3 in the GTD class during Sunday’s IMSA WeatherTech Sportscar Championship race at Laguna Seca. Jack Hawksworth and Ben Barnicoat ran among the top three for much of the race with the No. 14 Lexus RC F GT3 before finishing ninth in GTD PRO. The post Top 10 Finishes for Lexus RC F GT3s at Laguna Seca appeared first on Lexus USA Newsroom .

entries.title: ALL-ELECTRIC THREE-ROW LUXURY: THE ALL-NEW 2027 LEXUS TZ
entries.description: PLANO, Texas (May 6, 2026) – Lexus expands its electrified lineup for 2027 with the all-new Lexus TZ, the brand’s first three-row, all-electric, AWD SUV. Built on Lexus’ TNGA platform, it is designed to blend driving enjoyment with refined comfort, supporting diverse lifestyles while delivering exceptional luxury SUV dynamics. It features two lithium-ion battery options—76.96 kWh and 95.82 kWh—and employs an evolved DIRECT4 AWD system. An enhanced body structure ensures handling stability and...

entries.title: LEXUS UNVEILS THE TZ, AN ALL-NEW, ALL-ELECTRIC SIX-SEAT SUV
entries.description: All-new, all-electric three-row/six-seat SUV designed to support a wide variety of lifestyles “Driving Lounge,” a new Lexus concept that promotes natural relaxation with Lexus’ signature quietness, refinement and ride comfort BEV powertrain provides quiet, smooth performance that supports the Driving Lounge concept and helps create space for adult-size third row seats with generous head and leg room Exterior design balances powerful SUV styling with sleek elegance and efficient aerodynamic pe...

entries.title: LEXUS ON POLE POSITION AT SPA-FRANCORCHAMPS
entries.description: A Lexus RC F LMGT3 race car will start the second round of the 2026 FIA World Endurance Championship (WEC) race from the front Rising star Hadrien David recorded the fastest time in the #78 Lexus RC F LMGT3 entered by the AKKODIS ASP Team Lexus is pushing boundaries and establishing itself as a genuine contender in its third season of WEC competition Lexus won pole position for the second round of the FIA World Endurance Championship (WEC) after the RC F LMGT3 race car delivered a spectacular...

entries.title: THE NEXT ERA IN MULTIMEDIA: LEXUS INTERFACE SETS A NEW STANDARD
entries.description: PLANO, Texas (May 11, 2026) – Lexus is ushering in a new era of in-cabin technology with eye-catching design, innovative features, and unparalleled performance. The enhanced version of the Lexus Interface multimedia system will make its debut in the 2026 ES before rolling out to future models in the Lexus lineup. The post THE NEXT ERA IN MULTIMEDIA: LEXUS INTERFACE SETS A NEW STANDARD appeared first on Lexus USA Newsroom .

entries.title: LEXUS BRINGS “SKETCH TO STREET” DESIGN EXPERIENCE TO NYCXDESIGN®
entries.description: NEW YORK (May 14, 2026) – Lexus will present “Sketch to Street: See the process. Feel the craft.” NYCxDESIGN®, an immersive multi-day activation in Times Square, is being held May 14–19 and explores how ideas move from initial sketch to final form through visual art, fashion and automotive design. The post LEXUS BRINGS “SKETCH TO STREET” DESIGN EXPERIENCE TO NYCXDESIGN<sup>®</sup> appeared first on Lexus USA Newsroom .

entries.title: THE ALL-NEW LEXUS ES: REDEFINING THE LUXURY SEDAN
entries.description: Eighth generation of the luxury sedan introduces a new direction in Lexus design and technology A larger, more advanced ES that reinterprets classic sedan style and luxury for the electrified era Production model directly inspired by the LF-ZC Concept study Clean Tech x Elegance design delivers a sleek, elegant exterior and open, uncluttered and luxurious interior Lexus multipath electrified powertrain options ES 350e and ES 500e battery electric models ES 300h and ES 350h self-charging hybri...

entries.title: LEXUS RC F GT3S SALVAGE TOP 10 FINISHES AFTER LATE RACE INCIDENTS IN DETROIT
entries.description: DETROIT (June 1, 2026) – With podium finishes in view for both Vasser Sullivan Lexus RC F GT3 entries in Saturday’s IMSA WeatherTech SportsCar Championship, late race contact on the streets of downtown Detroit resulted in Jack Hawksworth and Ben Barnicoat finishing sixth while Aaron Telitz and Chaz Mostert earned a 10th-place result in the GTD PRO class. The post LEXUS RC F GT3S SALVAGE TOP 10 FINISHES AFTER LATE RACE INCIDENTS IN DETROIT appeared first on Lexus USA Newsroom .
